subcodes.first_line: O Lord, the Forgiver of transgressions and the Pardoner of sins and iniquities, Thou dost forgive whomsoever Thou willest through Thy boundless mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا غافر الخطاء و عافی الذنوب و الاثام تغفر من تشاء برحمتک الواسعه
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for forgiveness, @prayer for the departed, @nearness and remoteness
